title: Evhenii Kofan — Technical Engineer
description: Evhenii Kofan — Technical Engineer, Drone Systems, Embedded Systems, Electronics, Technical Project Manager and R&D specialist.

text..lead: I combine software engineering, server infrastructure, electronics, automation, and technical team management.
text.#about h2: From system administrator to technical leader
text.#about .prose p:nth-child(1): A hands-on technical specialist with experience in IT, infrastructure, web development, automation, team management, and R&D.
text.#about .prose p:nth-child(2): Progressed from system administrator and web developer to Head of Technical Department, COO, and Project Manager. Currently developing expertise in Drone Technologies, Embedded Systems, Electronics & Robotics, Computer Vision, Cyber Security, Automation & AI.
text.#skills .section-heading > p: Practical tools for prototyping, infrastructure, and project delivery.
text..skill-card:nth-child(1) p: FPV assembly, repair and diagnostics, Betaflight, ELRS, RadioMaster, firmware flashing, calibration, and testing.
text..skill-card:nth-child(2) p: Arduino, ESP32, Raspberry Pi, STM32 / AVR, UART, SPI, I2C, GPIO.
text..skill-card:nth-child(3) p: THT soldering, basic SMD, multimeter use, Li-Ion packs, spot welding, and PC repair.
text..skill-card:nth-child(4) p: Python, C++, Kotlin, MySQL, HTML/CSS, Telegram Bot API.
text..skill-card:nth-child(5) p: Ubuntu, Debian, Windows, Proxmox VE, Docker, VPN, backups, networking, GitHub.
text..skill-card:nth-child(6) p: PM, COO, Team Lead, n8n, hiring, documentation, WordPress, Joomla, OpenCart, MODX, Bitrix.
text.#experience .section-heading > p: Team leadership, engineering practice, automation, and web products.
text..timeline article:nth-child(1) p: Managing a development team, planning, delivery control, prioritization, and communication between project participants.
text..timeline article:nth-child(2) p: Managing the technical department, optimizing processes, building infrastructure, and automating workflows with n8n.
text..timeline article:nth-child(3) p: Building internal processes, coordinating departments, providing technical management, data parsing, and automating operational tasks.
text..timeline article:nth-child(4) p: Android/Kotlin development, mobile app analytics, and Telegram CRM content management.
text..timeline article:nth-child(5) p: Team management, recruitment, task allocation, development control, SEO, PPC, and email marketing.
text..timeline article:nth-child(6) p: GrilleGuard, PartsQ, Prom-Okean, UkraїnkaFest, and Anima: CMS website development, SEO, PPC, Analytics/GTM, A/B testing, and technical support.
text..timeline article:nth-child(7) p: System administration at KNEU, network installation at Kyivstar, mechanical repair work at PGZK, and operational experience at McDonald’s.
text.#labs .section-heading > p: An environment for continuous learning, testing, and prototyping.
text..lab-grid article:nth-child(1) p: FPV drone assembly, firmware flashing, configuration, and diagnostics.
text..lab-grid article:nth-child(2) p: Power banks, battery packs, Li-Ion testing, and spot welding.
